creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Details! 👇🏼

Bean Point Beach – Anna Maria Island
Why Go: Secluded white sands and turquoise waters; perfect for sunsets and dolphin sightings.
Address: North end of Anna Maria Island, Anna Maria, FL 34216
Hours: Sunrise to 10:00 PM

Oscar Scherer State Park – Osprey
Why Go: Hike, bike, or kayak amidst diverse wildlife and scenic trails.
Address: 1843 S. Tamiami Trail, Osprey, FL 34229
Hours: 8:00 AM – Sunset, daily

The Ringling Museum – Sarasota
Why Go: Explore art, history, and stunning gardens in a historic estate.
Address: 5401 Bay Shore Rd, Sarasota, FL 34243
Hours: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM daily; extended hours on Thursdays until 8:00 PM

The Canyons Zip Line & Adventure Park – Ocala
Why Go: Experience thrilling zip lines over canyons and lakes—yes, in Florida!
Address: 8045 NW Gainesville Rd, Ocala, FL 34475
Hours: Tours typically from 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM

The Dalí Museum – St. Petersburg
Why Go: Immerse yourself in surrealism with an extensive collection of Dalí’s works.
Address: 1 Dali Blvd, St. Petersburg, FL 33701
Hours: 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM daily; Thursdays until 8:00 PM

Fort De Soto Park – Tierra Verde
Why Go: Pristine beaches, historic fort, and ample outdoor activities.
Address: 3500 Pinellas Bayway S, Tierra Verde, FL 33715
Hours: 7:00 AM – 11:00 PM daily

Four Mile Cove Ecological Preserve – Cape Coral
Why Go: Peaceful boardwalks through mangroves and opportunities for wildlife viewing.
Address: 2220 SE 21st Ave, Cape Coral, FL 33990
Hours: 8:00 AM – Dusk, daily

Sunshine Skyway Bridge – Tampa Bay
Why Go: Iconic bridge offering breathtaking views over Tampa Bay.
Address: I-275, St. Petersburg, FL 33711
Hours: Open 24/7

Boca Grande – Gasparilla Island
Why Go: Charming island town with beautiful beaches and historic sites.
Address: Boca Grande, FL 33921
Hours: Accessible daily; local businesses have varying hours
Best Time to Visit: Spring for pleasant weather and blooming flora.

Follow me for more places to visit around Florida!

transcription.text: Everything that kills me Makes me feel alive
